metadata.creator: AddictingGames
metadata.description:
GAME DESCRIPTION

Bloxorz is a free puzzle game. All that we ask is that you help us maintain order. A square peg into a square hole. It's simple. Geometric shapes and their ability to interlock are the basic building blocks of order. If we can't move them around and drop them into place, we have anarchy. We don't want anarchy. We don't want our shapes walking all willy nilly off the sides of platforms, beyond the edge of the grid, or into the oblivion of the unknown beneath it. There is a certain beauty in order and an undeniable deformity in chaos. An ugly, insidious aesthetic which robs the natural world of its god-given balance and beauty. And all that we ask is that you help us maintain order That you help us keep the world beautiful, that you keep the square pegs snugly in their square holes. This is done for you, for me, and for thee betterment of the world.


INSTRUCTIONS

Use the W,A,S,D pad or the arrow pad to roll and flip the square pegs. Square pegs are meant to fit into square holes. Please navigate them there.
metadata.title: Bloxorz

metadata.creator: Adult Swim
metadata.description:
Robot Unicorn Attack is a Flash game developed by Spiritonin Media Games and published by Adult Swim. It's an endless runner where players take control of a robotic unicorn. The goal is to get the highest score, which is obtained by running for as long as possible, collecting pixies, and dashing through crystal stars.

Robot Unicorn Attack was ported to iOS and Android, and received several sequels and spinoffs. The most recent was the 2017 mobile-exclusive Robot Unicorn Attack 3. The game's viral fame led to a surge in popularity for the 1994 song Always by the British band Erasure, as it was the game's soundtrack.

As of November 2020, it is fully playable in Ruffle with a few graphical bugs.

reviews.reviewbody: I was so worried that I'd have to maintain some archaic vulnerable browser config into 2021 to relish this classic.  Thank you for preserving it!

Yassssssssssssssssssssssssssss. Robot Unicorn forever.

Shame the idiot developers have no sense of love for the past. Like leaving this behind is as bad as leaving pac man behind. You just don't do it. I'd pay 5 bucks again and again to keep playing this on newer phones and my laptop.
This is the most triumphant flash game the internet ever saw. I played it for hours and I am forever grateful to the kind people who worked to preserve this game and other flash content!
yes
This game is my absolute favourite, thank you Internet Archive

My god, what a flashback! My group was obsessed with this game in high school. We could only play it on a webpage that JUST hosted Robot Unicorn Attack since all the normal sites were blocked. Playing it now and realizing what an incredible sensory overload it is. I don't know how I coped!

Hush everyone, lest Erasure tries to sue Internet Archive too in a misguided attempt to "make more money" (not realizing that letting this game circulate is FREE PUBLICITY-people will buy the track as long as you aren't greedy corporate asshats about it). 
The greedy corporate asshats are going to take away all of our hopes, dreams, games, books, movies, music...support Internet Archive and encourage their fight against the corporate asshats! ALWAYS!

metadata.creator: Pouetpu Games
metadata.description:
Super Mario Flash 2, sequel of Super Mario Flash, is what a sequel
should be, the same with more stuff :D. Now based on Super Mario World,
the game include : vertical scrolling, two layers of tiles,
Auto-scrolling levels, Movable layer 2 (screenshot 5) and Water Mode
level.
SMF2 contain more types of collisions than SMF : ledges, water tiles
and different kind of slopes. Mario has also more moves, he can :
swim, slide, climb on vines, walk on walls and fly using his magic cape
(feather). Mario can carry objects like a koopa shell, a springboard or
the pow switch.
Yoshi is also present to help Mario to deal with way more types of
monsters than the first game. The world map is back with a SMW look, you
can
unlock the four hidden switch palace. Super Mario Flash 2, of course,
also includes an in-game level editor which allows you to create your
own levels
with powers ups, tiles, monsters and platforms. Note: you can save and
share your levels using level codes generated by the game. The game also
use the
flash player to run into your browser, so make sure you have the latest
version installed.
metadata.subject: nintendo
metadata.title: Super Mario Flash 2

metadata.notes:
Made for Ludum Dare 22 - Theme: Alone

The enhanced version of /follow was released a few days after the "release version" and includes a preloader, an alternative ending, and credits - all of which could not be included in the "release" version of the game.

The release version of /follow was made for Ludum Dare 21 and contains some bugs, less polish, and an ending that doesn't appear in the "enhanced version".
